# PR Review: #33451 - ApplyQueryAttributes gets called with empty Dictionary on back

**Date:** 2026-01-09 | **Issue:** [#33415](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/33415) | **PR:** [#33451](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/pull/33451)

## Summary

**Issue:** `ApplyQueryAttributes` called with empty dictionary on back navigation, violating Microsoft's documented behavior.

**Fix:** Skip `ApplyQueryAttributes` when `mergedData.Count == 0 && isPopping == true` in both code paths.

**Tests:** Comprehensive UI tests created that FAIL without fix, PASS with fix.

**PR:** https://github.com/dotnet/maui/pull/33451
